title: Summit: sample landing template
desc: Demonstration landing page. All text is sample (dummy) content.

sections.sub: Summit brings the people shaping tomorrow's tech onto one stage, with talks, workshops and hallway conversations that stick.
Two days of deep talks, hands-on labs and the connections you actually remember.
cards: Three tracks of talks picked for signal, not filler.
Structured intros and open spaces to meet your people.
Build something live with experts beside you.
Ask the questions you came for, face to face.
One downtown venue with everything within reach.
Evening socials, demos and music to keep it going.

sections.text: No vendor pitches in disguise. Every session is chosen for real lessons you can take back to your team on Monday.
Great talks get you in the room, but the people are why you stay. We build in time and space to actually meet them.

sections.sub: From sign-up to the front row in three steps.
steps: Pick your pass and check out in under a minute.
Build a schedule from the agenda in the app.
Walk in, scan your badge and dive into the talks.

sections.quote: I came for two talks and left with a new co-founder, three hires and a notebook full of ideas. Best ticket I bought all year.
sections.author: Sample Person

sections.sub: Prices rise as seats fill. Lock yours in early.

items: It runs over two days at a single downtown venue. Exact dates and address are on the venue page.
Yes. The free Community pass includes the main stage livestream and recordings afterward.
Every standard and pro ticket includes access to recordings of all sessions after the event.
Tickets are transferable up to one week before the event if your plans change.
Yes, discounted student passes are available with valid ID, subject to availability.

sections.h2: Ready to join us on stage-side?
sections.sub: Seats are limited and prices go up as we fill. Grab yours while early-bird lasts.

sections.tagline: Two days of tech talks, labs and the connections that stick. Sample dummy brand for template preview.
sections.copyright: // Summit is a sample template with dummy content
